message:
Remove broken reusable PR verifier workflow reference (#9791)

The PR Verifier has been failing with startup_failure on every PR
across all branches because the reusable workflow at
kubestellar/infra (pinned at 88f4d5f) depends on the container
image ghcr.io/kubestellar/pr-verifier:v0.4.3 which is no longer
accessible. The infra commit 88f4d5f already planned for caller
cleanup PRs to follow the removal of the PR title emoji checker.

Replace the reusable workflow call with a simple inline job that
always passes, unblocking all PRs.

Fixes #9763

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,8 +8,11 @@ permissions: read-all
 
 jobs:
   verify:
+    name: verify PR contents
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     permissions:
       checks: write
       pull-requests: read
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-pr-verifier.yml@88f4d5fff50ceea648cdd3848ed1835ebded5fe3 # main
-    secrets: inherit
+    steps:
+      - name: PR verification
+        run: echo "PR verification passed"
